title: [MTR4] Hankyu 9000 Series | 阪急9000系
description: Hankyu 9000 Series for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
The Hankyu 9000 series is an electric multiple unit (EMU) operated by private railway operator Hankyu Railway on the Kobe and Takarazuka Main Lines. Introduced in 2006, the train features a sleeker and more modern design than its predecessors, particularly in the front end styling. A derivative of the 9000 series operates on the Kyoto Main Line with alternate car body dimensions and different traction equipment, called the 9300 series.

This resource pack adds the 9000 series to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod with a custom model and textures.

The real-world formation of the train is as follows, however you may configure the train as you like. Each car is 19 blocks long.

- Cab forwards
- 5 x Trailer
- Pantograph trailer
- Cab backwards
